subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that ye are present in this radiant assemblage and have turned your faces ... Glad tidings! Glad tidings! The Morn of Guidance hath dawned.
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله در این انجمن نورانی حاضریم و به ملکوت ابهی متوجه آنچه ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @growth of the Cause, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @light and darkness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
